headline: COMPLIANT TO THE DOORSTEP
subheading: Engineer GDP-grade temperature, security and traceability controls into every last-mile delivery you make.
flux_prompt: An abstract editorial composition evoking pharmaceutical last-mile cold-chain distribution, set against a deep navy gradient background. A luminous teal and cyan route line traces an elegant path from a stylised secured warehouse node, through an abstract refrigerated vehicle silhouette, to a softly glowing doorway endpoint representing the patient's home. A geometric insulated parcel with a subtle tamper-evident seal floats in shallow depth of field, faint condensation glints catching cool light, beside a minimalist temperature data-logger waveform rendered as a clean teal monitoring line with a subtle green in-range accent. Translucent glass-like hexagonal molecular motifs and delicate connected-node network lines suggest unbroken chain of custody and traceability. Premium clinical-luxury aesthetic, frosted-glass surfaces, soft volumetric lighting, precise and trustworthy mood, generous negative space on the left for layout. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
